text: Use to generate cell data for producing tunnels through voxels.
Returns an array table of pathing results. Each element consisting of a table {positions={[Vec3],...}} of position arrays.
params: An table of available pathing settings to be used by tunnel requests. {costNoiseFrequency=number,costNoiseIntensity=number,costZPenalty=number}
An array table of tunnel requests. {{posA=[Vec3], posB=[Vec3](, dirA=[Vec3])(, dirB=[Vec3]), pathingSettings=string},...}
Size of each grid cell in world units. (Used for debug draw only.)
return: An array table with one tunnel result per request. {{positions={[Vec3],...}}, ...}
